'''''Vanguard''''' was an [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] commanded by [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Ritton]] in the years following the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]].

==History==
In [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]], Imperial [[Walker/Legends|walkers]] from the ''Vanguard'' paraded on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] at the overture of the [[New Year Fete Week/Legends|New Year Fete Week]] festivities.<ref name="GNN8">{{JournalCite|8|Galaxywide NewsNets}}</ref>

The Star Destroyer was best known for being the [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]] of then-[[Vice Admiral/Legends|Vice Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]] during [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Demetrius Zaarin]]'s attempted coup approximately [[3 ABY/Legends|one year before]] the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]].

After Zaarin managed to take [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] prisoner from aboard the [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] [[Majestic (Imperial-class)|''Majestic'']], Zaarin had Palpatine transferred to a [[Delta-class JV-7 escort shuttle|''Delta''-class JV-7 escort shuttle]] which was tasked with rendezvousing with Zaarin's flagship, [[Glory (Imperial-class)|''Glory'']].

Hoping to stop the exchange and rescue the Emperor, [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Lord Darth Vader]], along with ace pilot [[Maarek Stele/Legends|Maarek Stele]], deployed from aboard the ''Vanguard'' in a [[TIE/sa tactical bomber/Legends|TIE/sa bomber]] assault on the ''Glory''. Taken by surprise, Zaarin was forced to withdraw, and the ''Vanguard'' successfully rescued Palpatine.

==Behind the scenes==
While in the game [[Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'']] Vanguard is an [[Imperial I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial I''-class Star Destroyer]], it is erroneously classified as a [[Victory I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory I''-class Star Destroyer]] in ''[[TIE Fighter Collector's CD-ROM: The Official Strategy Guide]]''.
